title: Handshake Tone
lyricSeed:
Screaming modem in the dark, connect to me
Blue light melts across my face at 3 AM
Static kisses, dial-up hymns are all I need
Waiting for the ping, waiting for the ping
Corrupted lullaby, my only friend
Don't hang up, don't hang up, stay online with me
